creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Tijl,

Is this patch still valid? This, plus Uses/iconv.mk not including localbase.mk when it depends on the iconv port, is causing failures in the CMake 3.3.1 exp-run (bug 202516) on 10.1-RELEASE, as the port depends on converters/iconv but forces a dependency on base's iconv that fails because /usr/local/include/iconv.h ends up being preferred when building.
